subject: Swift Trigger 1191904 is not a GRB
body:
K. L. Page (U Leicester) report on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift
Observatory Team:

Swift Trigger 1191904 (2023-09-13 16:53:35 UT) is also not an astrophysical event. 
It is a spurious trigger due to a misidentification of the Crab during a star 
tracker Loss-of-Lock event.
